item.title: Agent Retrieval Skill
item.description: Agent retrieval skill Any AI agent with web access can query a published Distillary brain. No API keys, no MCP server, no authentication.

item.title: readme
item.description: Distillary Turn any knowledge source into a navigable, shareable brain.

item.title: Distillary
item.description: Distillary Turn any knowledge source into a navigable, shareable brain.

item.title: Quick Start
item.description: Quick start Try an existing brain (30 seconds) Before building your own, browse one that’s already published: Go to the Demo Brain Click a source’s root thesis — read the book’s argument in one paragraph Follow [[wikilinks]] to drill into clusters, then arguments, then evidence Open any entity page ...

item.title: Cross-Source Analytics
item.description: Cross-source analytics When your brain has two or more sources, Distillary generates a full analytical layer in shared/analytics/.

item.title: Demo: 10 Questions
item.description: Demo: 10 questions answered from the live brain All answers below were retrieved from brain.distillary.xyz using the retrieval skill.

item.title: Publishing Your Brain
item.description: Publishing your brain Share your brain as a static website with graph view, search, and an agent-queryable API.

item.title: Architecture
item.description: Architecture Three layers graph LR Claude[".claude/<br/>Agents + Skills"] --> Python["distillary/<br/>Python utilities"] Python --> Brain["brain/<br/>Obsidian vault"] Brain --> Quartz["Published site<br/>+ agent.json"] LayerWha...

item.title: Tag Taxonomy
item.description: Tag taxonomy Every claim in a Distillary brain is tagged across 6 dimensions. Each dimension answers a different question about the claim.

item.title: Pyramid Design
item.description: Pyramid design Every source in a Distillary brain is organized as a 4-layer pyramid.
